systemMonitor.externalMonitor: resources || missioncenter || jdsystemmonitor || corestats || system-monitoring-center || gnome-system-monitor || plasma-systemmonitor || mate-system-monitor || ukui-system-monitor || deepin-system-monitor || pantheon-system-monitor

idle.customCommands: [{"name":"lock with hyprlock","timeout":300,"command":"status=$(cat /sys/class/power_supply/ACAD/online); [ \"$status\" -eq 1 ] && noctalia-shell ipc call lockScreen lock || (noctalia-shell ipc call lockScreen lock & systemctl suspend-then-hibernate)","resumeCommand":""}]
